**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 131 **Price** 14,000 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- Heavenly radiance shines from an active _celestial staff_, a golden staff capped with a pair of sculpted angel’s wings. Used as a weapon, the staff is a _[+2 greater striking ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2861) [holy ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2842) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=367)_. While wielding a celestial staff, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against effects that have the [evil](/Traits.aspx?ID=64) trait and effects created by evil creatures. When you prepare this staff, if you’re evil, you become [drained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=68) 1 until your next daily preparations. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** [_divine lance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1498) (good only)
  • **1st** [_ bless_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1451), [_protection_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1641)
  • **2nd** [_ continual flame_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1518), [_inner radiance torrent_](/Spells.aspx?ID=934)
  • **3rd** [_ circle of protection _](/Spells.aspx?ID=38), [_sanctified ground_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1965)
  • **4th** [_ holy cascade_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2000), _inner radiance torrent_
  • **5th** [_ spiritual guardian_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1688), [_summon celestial_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1695)
  • **6th** _ holy cascade_, _summon celestial_
  • **7th** [_ angel form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=862), _inner radiance torrent_, _summon celestial_
**Craft Requirements** You're good. Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
name: Celestial Staff

**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 131 **Price** 15,000 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- Clock faces and gears adorn the twisted iron shaft of a _chronomancer staff_, the hands of the clocks continually ticking or winding backward. Used as a weapon, the staff is a _[+2 greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2861) [ speed](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2844) [ staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=367)_. While wielding this staff, you also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** [_ time sense_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1193)
  • **1st** [_ déjà vu_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1986), [_synchronize_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1013)
  • **2nd** [_ loose time’s arrow_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1185), synchronize
  • **3rd** [_ day’s weight_](/Spells.aspx?ID=891), [_haste_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1553), [_slow_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1677), [_time jump_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1019)
  • **4th** [_ curse of lost time_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1985)
  • **5th** [_ quicken time_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1187), [_rewinding step_](/Spells.aspx?ID=985), [_stagnate time_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1188)
  • **6th** [_ cast into time_](/Spells.aspx?ID=880), _day’s weight_
  • **7th** [_ time beacon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2371)
**Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 131 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A composer staff is short and shaped like an elegant black _conductor’s baton_ with a silver tip. When waved through the air, it hums melodically. In this way, you can play it as though it were an instrument, and it grants a +1 item bonus to [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) checks made with it. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Composer Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 131 **Price** 80 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_ haunting hymn_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1999), [_summon instrument_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1703)
  • **1st** [_ concordant choir_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1979)
Composer Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 132 **Price** 480 gp ---
  • **2nd** [_ sonata span_](/Spells.aspx?ID=998)
  • **3rd** [_ concordant choir_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1979), [_roaring applause_](/Spells.aspx?ID=987), [_sculpt sound_](/Spells.aspx?ID=714)
Composer Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 132 **Price** 1,800 gp --- The item bonus is +2.
  • **4th** [_ infectious melody_](/Spells.aspx?ID=933)

**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 132 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A multi-hued array of scales covers a _dragonscale staff_, forming a gradient of color, and a dragon’s claw holds a gem upon the staff’s head. Dragons give allies these staves as a mark of esteem. While wielding a _dragonscale staff_ you seem fiercer, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) checks to [Demoralize](/Actions.aspx?ID=2395). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Dragonprism Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 132 **Price** 4,500 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_gouging claw_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1546), p[_uff of poison_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2016)
  • **1st** [_burning hands_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1457), [_fear_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1524)
  • **2nd** [_acid arrow_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1436), [_resist energy_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1651)
  • **3rd** _fear_, [_lightning bolt_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1586)
  • **4th** [_fly_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1534), [_reflective scales_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2362)
  • **5th** [_cone of cold_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1559), [_summon dragon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1697)
  • **6th** [_dragon form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1502), _reflective scales_, _summon dragon_
Dragonprism Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 132 **Price** 68,000 gp ---
  • **7th** _summon dragon_
  • **8th** _dragon form_, _summon dragon_
  • **9th** [_summon draconic legion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1008), _summon dragon_

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 132 **Price** 2,000 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A small glass orb on the head of a _gambler’s staff_ holds a pair of six-sided dice that shift and roll within. Spellcasters who make their living via games of chance use _gamblers’ staves_ to encourage the odds in their favor. Most gambling dens ban players they discover using such magic items. A _gambler’s staff_ grants you a +2 circumstance bonus to checks to [Earn Income](/Actions.aspx?ID=2364) from gambling (typically using [Games Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41)). To get this benefit, the staff must be on your person during all the downtime you spend gambling. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** [_wash your luck_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1031)
  • **1st** [_nudge the odds_](/Spells.aspx?ID=957)
  • **2nd** l[_ucky number_](/Spells.aspx?ID=941)
  • **3rd** [_shift blame_](/Spells.aspx?ID=997)
  • **4th** [_ read omens_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1647), [_winning streak_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1034)
  • **5th** _ nudge the odds_
**Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
name: Gambler's Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 132 **Price** 13,000 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _hell staff_ is a tall, pointed staff forged of red-tinted steel with Infernal inscriptions that march neatly down its sides. At its top sits an inverted ruby pyramid divided into nine sections. Found mostly in Cheliax or other lands where diabolic influences hold sway, when used as a weapon the staff is a _[+3 greater striking ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2861) [axiomatic ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=291) [unholy ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2851) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=367)_. When you prepare this staff, if you’re [chaotic](/Traits.aspx?ID=25) or [good](/Traits.aspx?ID=83), you become [drained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=68) 1 until your next daily preparations. The staff’s [_summon lesser servitor_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2034) spell can be used only to summon animals with the [fiend](/Traits.aspx?ID=600) trait, [devils](/Traits.aspx?ID=575), or [hell hounds](/Monsters.aspx?ID=3047) (at 4th level). Its [_summon fiend_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1701) spell can summon only devils or hell hounds. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** [_divine lance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1498) (evil or lawful only)
  • **1st** [_protection_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1641), [_summon lesser servitor_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2034)
  • **2nd** _summon lesser servitor_, [_undetectable alignment_](/Spells.aspx?ID=348)
  • **3rd** [_chilling darkness_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1464), _summon lesser servitor_
  • **4th** [_divine wrath_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1499) (evil or lawful only), _summon lesser servitor_
  • **5th** [_flame strike_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1496), [_summon fiend_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1701)
  • **6th** [_devil form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=894), _summon fiend_
  • **7th** _divine decree_ (evil or lawful only), _summon fiend_
**Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
name: Hell Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 133 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _librarian staff_ is a slender pole composed of thousands of coiled and compressed book pages swirling into one another, with a mishmash of letters tumbling across its surface. The sound of rustling pages can be heard when the staff moves. **Activate** command, envision, Interact; **Effect** You store one portable text of 1 Bulk or less—typically a book or scroll—in an [extradimensional](/Traits.aspx?ID=596) space in the staff. You can also use this activation to retrieve one text stored in the staff. The staff can store up to 50 texts. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Librarian's Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 133 **Price** 225 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_approximate_](/Spells.aspx?ID=864) , [_read aura_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1646)
  • **1st** [_pocket library_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2291), [_quick sort_](/Spells.aspx?ID=978), [_share lore_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2363)
  • **2nd** [_comprehend language_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1723), [_timely tutor_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1020)
Librarian's Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 133 **Price** 1,750 gp --- The staff can store up to 100 texts.
  • **3rd** _comprehend language_, [_pocket library_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2291), [_quick sort_](/Spells.aspx?ID=978), [_share lore_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2363)
  • **4th** _comprehend language_
  • **5th** _quick sort_, _share lore_
name: Librarian Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 133 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A crystalline sphere, swirling with constantly shifting constellations, sits atop a _lyrakien staff_, a silver shaft that sparkles with the gentle glow of starlight. [Desnans](/Deities.aspx?ID=281) first created the staves, inspired by the music- and freedom-loving [lyrakien ](/Monsters.aspx?ID=2840) [azatas](/MonsterFamilies.aspx?ID=368), but these staves are popular with spellcasters of all faiths who like travel, art, or the stars. While wielding a _lyrakien staff_, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against [incapacitation](/Traits.aspx?ID=631) effects. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Lyrakien Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 133 **Price** 225 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_guidance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1549), [_summon instrument_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1703)
  • **1st** [_concordant choir_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1979)
  • **2nd** [_guiding star_](/Spells.aspx?ID=923), [_remove paralysis_](/Spells.aspx?ID=253)
Lyrakien Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 133 **Price** 920 gp --- The circumstance bonus is +2.
  • **3rd** [_dream message_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1503), [_safe passage_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1659), [_wanderer’s guide_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2043)
  • **4th** [_concordant choir_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1979), _dream message_, [_freedom of movement_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1732), _remove paralysis_
Lyrakien Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 133 **Price** 8,600 gp --- The circumstance bonus is +2.
  • **5th** [_safe passage_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1659), [_summon celestial_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1695) ([azatas](/Traits.aspx?ID=543) only)
  • **6th** [_concordant choir_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1979), [_zealous conviction_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1760)
  • **7th** [_cosmic form_](/Spells.aspx?ID=889), _remove paralysis_
name: Lyrakien Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 133 **Price** 2,000 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- Carved of driftwood stained white with the salt of the sea, a pirate staff has jewels and gold pieces embedded in the wood. A skull and crossbones sit on top. When used as a weapon, the staff is a _[+2 striking ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2861) [fearsome ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2837) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=367)_. While wielding the staff, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) checks to [Coerce](/Actions.aspx?ID=2394). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** [_gale blast_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1994), [_know direction_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1582)
  • **1st** [_seashell of stolen sound_](/Spells.aspx?ID=993)
  • **2nd** [_obscuring mist_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1606), [_water breathing_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1755), [_water walk_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1756)
  • **3rd** [_mind of menace_](/Spells.aspx?ID=949), _water breathing_
  • **4th** [_solid fog_](/Spells.aspx?ID=290), _water walk_
  • **5th** [_flowing strike_](/Spells.aspx?ID=914), [_mariner’s curse_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1593)
**Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
name: Pirate Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 134 **Price** 1,900 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _socialite staff_ is designed as an ornate cane, its metal body glimmering with jewels and gold inlays. A sculpture carved from obsidian tops the head of the staff, its design depending on its wielder’s taste. Common choices include birds, flowers, or family crests. While wielding a _socialite staff_, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to [Make an Impression](/Actions.aspx?ID=2392) on members of high society. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** read the air SoM
  • **1st** [_charm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1463), [_restyle_](/Spells.aspx?ID=984)
  • **2nd** [_befitting attire_](/Spells.aspx?ID=867), [_phantom crowd_](/Spells.aspx?ID=968)
  • **3rd** [_bottomless stomach_](/Spells.aspx?ID=875), [_shift blame_](/Spells.aspx?ID=997)
  • **4th** _befitting attire_, [_suggestion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1693)
  • **5th** _befitting attire_, _charm_, [_glimmer of charm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=919), _suggestion_
**Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
name: Socialite Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 134 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _spellstriker staff_ is wrought iron with gleaming arcane sigils etched into its surface and a sharp point at the bottom. Used as a weapon, the staff is a _[+1 striking ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2861) [shifting ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2846) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=367)_. **Activate** envision; **Frequency** once per hour; **Trigger** You use Spellstrike with a non-cantrip spell and miss with the Strike.; **Effect** An explosion of magical energy—stored up for the Spellstrike—explodes out. All creatures in a 5-foot [emanation](/Rules.aspx?ID=2387) take 1d6 damage per level of the spell, with a [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=2297) Reflex save against your spell DC. This damage is the same type the spell would have dealt, and the activation gains that trait; if the spell would have dealt multiple types of damage, choose one of them. If the damage of the explosion is [mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647), the save is Will instead of Reflex. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** You have the [magus’s ](/Classes.aspx?ID=17) [Spellstrike](/Actions.aspx?ID=755) activity. Spellstriker Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 134 **Price** 360 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_produce flame_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1565)
  • **1st** [_echoing weapon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=899), [_true strike_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1709)
  • **2nd** [_acid arrow_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1436), [_telekinetic maneuver_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1717)
Spellstriker Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 134 **Price** 1,400 gp --- Used as a weapon, the staff is a _+2 striking shifting staff_.
  • **3rd** [_echoing weapon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=899), [_haste_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1553)
  • **4th** _acid arrow_, [_weapon storm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1758)
Spellstriker Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 134 **Price** 8,500 gp --- Used as a weapon, the staff is a _+2 greater striking shifting staff_.
  • **5th** [_blink charge_](/Spells.aspx?ID=872), [_echoing weapon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=899), [_vampiric touch_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1736)
  • **6th** _acid arrow_, [_weapon storm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1758)
  • **7th** _blink charge_, [_true target_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1726)
name: Spellstriker Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- Geometric patterns are etched into the smooth brown and gray surface of a _staff of earth_, which makes a solid thud whenever tapped against the ground. While wielding a _staff of earth_, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude saves and DC against effects that [Shove](/Actions.aspx?ID=2380) you or knock you [prone](/Conditions.aspx?ID=88). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Staff of Earth **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 60 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_scatter scree_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2021)
  • **1st** [_pummeling rubble_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1642)
Staff of Earth (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 450 gp ---
  • **2nd** [_expeditious excavation_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2349), [_pummeling rubble_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1642)
  • **3rd** [_earthbind_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1506), [_shifting sand_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2365)
Staff of Earth (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 1,800 gp ---
  • **4th** [_expeditious excavation_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2349), [_shape stone_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1667), [_spike stones_](/Spells.aspx?ID=717)
  • **5th** [_blazing fissure_](/Spells.aspx?ID=870), [_wall of stone_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1751)
name: Staff of Earth

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _staff of water_ is most often made of driftwood, sometimes lacquered blue. Carved versions often have a wave pattern. The staff smells of rain or brine. While wielding a _staff of water_, you have [resistance](/Rules.aspx?ID=2318) 2 to [fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=604). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Staff of Water **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 60 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_spout_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2031)
  • **1st** [_create water_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1476), [_hydraulic push_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1561)
Staff of Water (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 450 gp --- The [resistance](/Rules.aspx?ID=2318) is 5.
  • **2nd** [_quench_](/Spells.aspx?ID=709), [_water walk_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1756)
  • **3rd** [_aqueous orb_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1443), [_wall of water_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1028)
Staff of Water (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 1,800 gp --- The resistance is 10.
  • **4th** [_crashing wave_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1984), [_hydraulic torrent_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1562)
  • **5th** [_control water_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1473), [_geyser_](/Spells.aspx?ID=918)
name: Staff of Water

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 13,000 gp **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _zealot staff’s_ color, iconography, and materials vary depending on the faith it’s dedicated to. An [Iomedaean](/Deities.aspx?ID=285) staff might be forged of gold and shaped like an ornamental sword, while a [Lamashtan](/Deities.aspx?ID=287) one could instead be made of blackened iron depicting monstrous faces. Used as a weapon, the staff is a _[+3 greater striking ](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2861) [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=367)_. The staff represents vehement support of the deity to whom the staff is dedicated, punishing defiance. When the staff’s effects require choosing alignments, you can choose only that deity’s alignments. No such staves exist for deities that are true neutral. When you prepare this staff, if you don’t worship its deity, you become [drained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=68) 1 until your next daily preparations. **Activate** envision; **Trigger** You hit with a Strike using the staff; **Effect** Choose one of the represented deity’s alignments besides neutral. You expend 1 charge from the staff and deal 1d4 damage per damage die of the staff. This damage is of the alignment type you chose. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrip** divine lance
  • **1st** [_bane_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1447)
  • **2nd** [_brand the impenitent_](/Spells.aspx?ID=570), [_spiritual weapon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1687)
  • **3rd** [_crisis of faith_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1478), [_warding aggression_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1029)
  • **4th** [_anathematic reprisal_](/Spells.aspx?ID=9), _spiritual weapon_
  • **5th** [_divine wrath_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1499)
  • **6th** _spiritual weapon_, [_zealous conviction_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1760)
  • **7th** [_divine decree_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1495)
**Craft Requirements** You worship the deity to which the staff is dedicated. Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
name: Zealot Staff

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _zombie staff_ is etched with the rotting visage of an undead humanoid grimacing in terror and dismay carved atop it. The staff’s _animate dead_ spells can be used only to animate undead that have flesh and an Intelligence modifier of –4 or lower. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. If you cast _animate dead_, you can also cast [_protect companion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=975) on the resulting minion as a free action. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Zombie Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 330 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** p[_rotect companion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=975)
  • **1st** [_animate dead_](/Spells.aspx?ID=666), [_necromancer’s generosity_](/Spells.aspx?ID=955)
  • **2nd** _animate dead_, [_final sacrifice_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1992)
Zombie Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 1,200 gp ---
  • **3rd** _animate dead_, [_bind undead_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1449), [_necromancer’s generosity_](/Spells.aspx?ID=955)
  • **4th** _animate dead_, [_enervation_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2046) , _final sacrifice_
Zombie Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 5,600 gp ---
  • **5th** _animate dead_, [_necromancer’s generosity_](/Spells.aspx?ID=955)
  • **6th** _animate dead_, _final sacrifice_, [_necrotize_](/Spells.aspx?ID=956)
name: Zombie Staff

Cantrip   p  rotect companion     1st     animate dead  ,   necromancer’s generosity     2nd    animate dead ,   final sacrifice
</summary>
summary_markdown: Cantrip   p  rotect companion     1st     animate dead  ,   necromancer’s generosity     2nd    animate dead ,   final sacrifice

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Usage** held in 1 hand **Bulk** 1 --- A _zombie staff_ is etched with the rotting visage of an undead humanoid grimacing in terror and dismay carved atop it. The staff’s _animate dead_ spells can be used only to animate undead that have flesh and an Intelligence modifier of –4 or lower. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. If you cast _animate dead_, you can also cast [_protect companion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=975) on the resulting minion as a free action. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Zombie Staff **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 330 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** p[_rotect companion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=975)
  • **1st** [_animate dead_](/Spells.aspx?ID=666), [_necromancer’s generosity_](/Spells.aspx?ID=955)
  • **2nd** _animate dead_, [_final sacrifice_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1992)
Zombie Staff (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 1,200 gp ---
  • **3rd** _animate dead_, [_bind undead_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1449), [_necromancer’s generosity_](/Spells.aspx?ID=955)
  • **4th** _animate dead_, [_enervation_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2046) , _final sacrifice_
Zombie Staff (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 135 **Price** 5,600 gp ---
  • **5th** _animate dead_, [_necromancer’s generosity_](/Spells.aspx?ID=955)
  • **6th** _animate dead_, _final sacrifice_, [_necrotize_](/Spells.aspx?ID=956)
name: Zombie Staff (Greater)

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Usage** held in 2 hands **Bulk** 1 --- While those who appreciate bagpipes may like the sound of this gray reed and black leather instrument, its real purpose is to sow turmoil against a performer’s enemies, spreading discord with each note. While playing the bagpipes, you gain a +1 item bonus to [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) checks and to [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) checks made to [Demoralize](/Actions.aspx?ID=2395). **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from this instrument to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Bagpipes of Turmoil **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Price** 90 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_daze_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1482)
  • **1st** [_bane_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1447)
Bagpipes of Turmoil (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Price** 460 gp ---
  • **2nd** [_deafness_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1483), [_knock_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1581), [_shatter_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1670)
  • **3rd** [_agonizing despair_](/Spells.aspx?ID=665), [_paralyze_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1622)
Bagpipes of Turmoil (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Price** 1,900 gp --- The item bonuses are +2.
  • **4th** _confusion_, [_painful vibrations_](/Spells.aspx?ID=964)
  • **5th** [_banishment_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1448), [_crushing despair_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1757), [_synaptic pulse_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1710)
name: Bagpipes of Turmoil

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Usage** held in 2 hands **Bulk** 1 --- This handheld snare drum is adorned with garish scenes of battle and triumph. When played, no matter what rhythm, it always gives the impression of a marching beat, invoking armies on the move. While playing the drums, you gain a +1 item bonus to [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) checks and a +5-foot status bonus to your Speed. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from this instrument to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Drums of War **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Price** 90 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_shield_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1671)
  • **1st** [_mage armor_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1611), [_magic missile_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1536), [_true strike_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1709)
Drums of War (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Price** 460 gp ---
  • 2nd** ** [_false life_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1523), [_sound burst_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1616), [_spiritual weapon_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1687)
  • **3rd** [_haste_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1553), [_heroism_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1555)
Drums of War (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Price** 1,900 gp --- The item bonus to [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) checks is +2.
  • **4th** [_spell immunity_](/Spells.aspx?ID=296), [_tortoise and the hare_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1021)
  • **5th** [_death ward_](/Spells.aspx?ID=64), [_quicken time_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1187), _spell immunity_
name: Drums of War

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Usage** held in 2 hands **Bulk** L --- This lustrous lute has a polished body that changes to show whatever decorations or carvings you find most appealing, or which best reinforce the story of the song you’re currently playing (as a free action). Its frets are inlaid with mother of pearl. With its mix of enchantment and illusion magic, it’s favored by many traveling minstrels. While playing the lute, you gain a +1 item bonus to [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) and [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) checks. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from this instrument to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Entertainer's Lute **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Price** 90 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_infectious enthusiasm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=932)
  • **1st** [_bless_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1451), [_ventriloquism_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1740)
Entertainer's Lute (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Price** 460 gp ---
  • **2nd** [_calm emotions_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1458), [_mirror image_](/Spells.aspx?ID=197)
  • **3rd** [_enthrall_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1516), [_heroism_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1555), [_illusory creature_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1567)
Entertainer's Lute (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Price** 1,900 gp --- The item bonuses are +2.
  • **4th** [_glibness_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1558), [_infectious melody_](/Spells.aspx?ID=933)
  • **5th** [_hallucination_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1551), [_illusory creature_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1567), [_illusory scene_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1570), [_suggestion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1693)
name: Entertainer's Lute

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 136 **Price** 10,000 gp **Usage** held in 2 hands **Bulk** L --- This exquisite fiddle is perfectly carved and balanced to produce the purest sound while granting its player perfect balance and poise. It grants a +2 item bonus to [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) checks. If you’re a master in Performance, while playing it you also gain a +1 status bonus to Reflex saves and a +1 item bonus to Dexterity-based skill checks. If you’re legendary in Performance, the bonuses are +2. When you Perform with the fiddle, you can choose to create a harsh and discordant note. You critically fail the Performance check, shred the strings of the fiddle, and create an 8th-level [_sound burst_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1616), with a 40-foot [emanation](/Rules.aspx?ID=2387) around you instead of a 10-foot [burst](/Rules.aspx?ID=2385). The fiddle can’t be played again until the strings are replaced at a cost of 200 gp. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from this instrument to cast a spell from its list.
  • **Cantrips** [_dancing lights_](/Spells.aspx?ID=58), [_ghost sound_](/Spells.aspx?ID=132), [_message_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1598)
  • **1st** [_command_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1470)
  • **2nd** [_calm emotions_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1458), [_faerie fire_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1653)
  • **3rd** [_enthrall_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1516)
  • **4th** [_glibness_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1558)
  • **5th** [_sending_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1665)
  • **6th** _calm emotions_, [_dominate_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1501), [_vibrant pattern_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1741)
  • **7th** _dominate_, [_prismatic spray_](/Spells.aspx?ID=233), [_true target_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1726), _vibrant pattern_, [_visions of danger_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2040)
**Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
name: Fiddle of the Maestro

While playing the pipes, you gain a +1 item bonus to [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) and [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) checks. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from this instrument to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.   • **Cantrip** [_daze_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1482)
  • **1st** [_charm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1463), [_command_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1470), [_fear_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1524)
Pipes of Compulsion (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 137 **Price** 460 gp ---
  • **2nd** [_hideous laughter_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1583), [_touch of idiocy_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1691)
  • **3rd** [_charm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1463), [_hypnotic pattern_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1564), [_mind reading_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1602), [_zone of truth_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1656)

  • **4th** [_confusion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1471), [_suggestion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1693)
  • **5th** [_charm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1463), [_glimmer of charm_](/Spells.aspx?ID=919), _suggestion_, [_telepathy_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1719)

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 137 **Usage** held in 2 hands **Bulk** L --- This ivory flute is adorned with many carvings of eyes. Each has jade pupils and a semiprecious stone as its iris. The eyes flutter open and closed when the flute is played, as if it held the eyes of many independent beings. While playing the flute, you gain a +1 item bonus to [Perception](/Rules.aspx?ID=3303) checks and [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) checks. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from this instrument to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Seer's Flute **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 137 **Price** 90 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_guidance_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1549), [_read aura_ ](/Spells.aspx?ID=1646)
  • **1st** [_detect alignment_](/Spells.aspx?ID=65)
Seer's Flute (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 137 **Price** 460 gp ---
  • **2nd** [_augury_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1445), [_see invisibility_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1663)
  • **3rd** [_clairaudience_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1465), [_hypercognition_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1563), [_wanderer’s guide_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2043)
Seer's Flute (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 137 **Price** 1,900 gp --- The item bonuses are +2.
  • **4th** _clairvoyance_, [_read omens_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1647)
  • **5th** [_inevitable disaster_](/Spells.aspx?ID=930), [_prying eye_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1661), [_tongues_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1728)
name: Seer's Flute

markdown:
**Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 137 **Usage** held in 2 hands **Bulk** L --- Sought after by many unscrupulous bards, this instrument is surprisingly light and easy to carry, but also empowered with a number of spells carefully selected to help with fooling others or making a hasty retreat. While playing the mandolin, you gain a +1 item bonus to [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=38) and [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) checks. **Activate** envision; **Effect** You change the instrument’s color and shape to one you prefer, and you can turn it into a different handheld string instrument that takes two hands to play. **Activate** Cast a Spell; **Effect** You expend a number of charges from this instrument to cast a spell from its list. **Craft Requirements** Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells. Trickster's Mandolin **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 137 **Price** 90 gp ---
  • **Cantrip** [_prestidigitation_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1639)
  • **1st** [_illusory disguise_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1568), [_item facade_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1579), [_ventriloquism_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1740)
Trickster's Mandolin (Greater) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 137 **Price** 460 gp ---
  • **2nd** i[_llusory creature_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1567), [_illusory disguise_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1568), [_invisibility_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1577), [_mirror image _](/Spells.aspx?ID=197)
  • **3rd** _illusory disguise_, [_phantom prison_](/Spells.aspx?ID=969), [_sculpt sound_](/Spells.aspx?ID=714)
Trickster's Mandolin (Major) **Source** [Treasure Vault](/Sources.aspx?ID=320) pg. 137 **Price** 1,900 gp --- The item bonuses are +2.
  • **4th** [_confusion_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1471), _invisibility_, [_veil_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1568)
  • **5th** [_hallucination_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1551), [_illusory scene_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1570), _veil_
name: Trickster's Mandolin
